weekly_summary: Over the past 7 days, our security landscape has been characterized by 21 total findings, with 9 unique CVEs tracked, including CVE-2026-3055, CVE-2026-33940, and CVE-2026-33943, among others. These vulnerabilities have been observed across multiple active security domains, including Browser Extensions, Containers, and OS/Kernel. The most active day was March 28, 2026, indicating a recent surge in security incidents. The diversity of affected domains and the low frequency of each CVE suggest a broad and dynamic threat environment, underscoring the need for continued vigilance and proactive security measures.
